xsl:stylesheet.extension-element-prefixes: datetime set math dateConversion myext nestedJsonParser string strings thetaray thetaray_minus1

ns2:query.xsl:variable: select id,servicename,amounttran/100,trancurrency,mobilenumber,(select homeaddress from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as adresse,(select nationality from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as nationality,(select gender from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as gender,(select nvl(placeofbirth,nationality) as placeofb from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid) as placeofbirth, destaccount,nvl(DESTMOBILENUMBER,MOBILENUMBER)as DESTMOBILENUMBER,walletcurrency,TRANSDATETIME,respcode,userid,concat(firstname,lastname)as fullName ,substr(TRANSDATETIME,0,8) as date_trans,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(transdatetime, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') as date_trans,destuserid,destaddress,destfirstname,destmerchantname,destcustomername ,(select p.abbreviation as nationality from wallet.fine_contact_country p where nationality = p.name)as nationality_code ,(select city from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as city from WALLET.ws_log WHERE servicename in (select service_name from wallet.transactioncodes where is_financial='1') and TRANSDATETIME BETWEEN '
